title: Ad Astra: Planetary Swapper
description: Adds a simple item to Ad Astra that allows for space travel without rockets
body:
# Features
This is a rather simple mod. It adds one Item (The Planetary Swapper) to [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra).
- When right clicked, it opens the Travel UI you usually get when leaving Orbit with a rocket, allowing travel between planets without a rocket
- The item has 64 Durability and goes on a Cooldown after Usage
- Due to balancing reasons, the item is only obtainable after reaching Glacio, the final planet in Ad Astras progression (See crafting recipe in [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/planetary-swapper/gallery))
